arts.ttl: Inter Milan star speaks out after ending Harry Kane's Champions League dream
arts.sum: Inter Milan, beaten by Manchester City in the 2023 Champions League Final, will face Barcelona in the final four as the Italians continue their pursuit of the treble

arts.ttl: Inter’s Lautaro Martinez after Bayern win: “Will remember this match for a long time”
arts.sum: Serie A giants Inter progressed to the semi-finals of the Champions League after holding Bayern Munich to a draw in the second leg of the quarter-final. The Nerazzurri went…

arts.ttl: Inter 2-2 Bayern Munich (4-3 agg.): Serie A leaders reach Champions League semi-finals
arts.sum: Serie A leaders came through the tie 4-3 on aggregate and face Barca next
Arsenal face PSG while Barcelona will meet Inter for place in Champions League final
